title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Hillary Clinton facing questions from House Oversight Committee in Epstein probe
items.description: Former first lady Hillary Clinton is facing lawmakers' questions over her and her husband's ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

items.description: Ford said a tech glitch can increase the risk of a crash for vehicles towing a trailer. Here's what to look for.

items.description: The price of silver, following a drop from a record high, is on the rise again. Here's where it sits as of February 26.

items.title: WATCH:  Schoolkids' act of kindness goes viral
items.description: A fourth-grade class in Florida is showing what can happen when everyone gives a little bit of love to someone in need.

items.title: DOJ says it's 'reviewing' whether Epstein reports were improperly withheld

Kilmar Abrego Garcia back in court in bid to have criminal case dropped
